description: 1. Polyester/nylon blend for lightweight durability2. Two-way zip opening and zip pockets on sides and front for optimum storage3. Small zip case for added convenience4. Adjustable and padded shoulder straps for added  comfort                                                                5. Slate-black in colour6. 18" length x 12" breadthThis backpack is big on space and style. It is light as a feather and looks stunningly good. Go packing with this Big cat!   Note: Not suitable for carrying laptop.
